languages.text: "Я — Лорд-капитан, и обвинения в слабости этого не изменят. Прошу, укроти свой неуместный гнев".

traits.locale_text: "Я — Лорд-капитан, по нраву вам это или нет. И ваши резкие слова умаляют лишь ваше достоинство".

languages.text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."
languages.original_text: "Я — Лорд-капитан, и обвинения в слабости этого не изменят. Прошу, укроти свой неуместный гнев".

traits.locale_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."
"I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."
"I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."
"I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

languages.text: «Soy {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán, y acusarme de debilidad no cambiará ese hecho. Su enfado está fuera de lugar y le insto a que se contenga».
languages.original_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

traits.locale_text: «Soy {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán, y acusarme de debilidad no cambiará ese hecho. Su enfado está fuera de lugar y le insto a que se contenga».

languages.text: “我是舰长大人，指责我软弱也改变不了这个事实。请你收起这份没来由的怒气。”
languages.original_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

traits.locale_text: “我是舰长大人，指责我软弱也改变不了这个事实。请你收起这份没来由的怒气。”

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine}, et toutes vos accusations de faiblesse n'y changeront rien. Veuillez tenir la bride à votre colère mal placée. »
languages.original_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine}, et toutes vos accusations de faiblesse n'y changeront rien. Veuillez tenir la bride à votre colère mal placée. »

languages.text: "Ben Lord Kaptan'ım. Zayıflık suçlamaları bu gerçeği değiştirmeyecek. Bu yersiz öfkeni dizginlemeni rica ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Lord Kaptan'ım. Zayıflık suçlamaları bu gerçeği değiştirmeyecek. Bu yersiz öfkeni dizginlemeni rica ediyorum."

languages.text: 「私は主船長である。弱さへの非難は、その事実を変えるものではない。見当違いの怒りを抑えろ」
languages.original_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

traits.locale_text: 「私は主船長である。弱さへの非難は、その事実を変えるものではない。見当違いの怒りを抑えろ」

languages.text: "Ich bin der Lord Captain, daran ändert auch die Behauptung, ich wäre schwach, nichts. Bitte zügelt Euren unangebrachten Zorn."
languages.original_text: "I am the Lord Captain, and accusations of weakness will not alter that fact. I ask you to curb your misplaced anger."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin der Lord Captain, daran ändert auch die Behauptung, ich wäre schwach, nichts. Bitte zügelt Euren unangebrachten Zorn."
